item.title: Stop Clickbait FTW dump
item.description: [Front page edit: OH MY GOD! I can't believe I made it to the the front page!!! And I got the Imgur13 trophy! Wow! You all made my day!] Hey! Long time lurker here! I rarely ever post but I am having a hard day and I feel like I deserve a trophy. This is my 13th favorite. #imgur13 Original post: https://imgur.com/gallery/v4SXA

item.title: Captured Russian soldier calls his family: "don't believe the TV, we bomb civilians." Fight for freedom, Stand with Ukrainian. Share this to your Russian friends not to trust Putin and his lies.
item.description: Source: https://www.reddit.com/r/ukraine/comments/t4y6xe/captured_russian_soldiers_calling_home_to/ Translation I'm warm, I'm fed. I can tell you, everything we've been told is bullshit. Were sitting her now, myself and the guys who brought me, and I can say one thing, I have no idea what the fuck we were told all this stuff for. Here, they have asphalt roads even in the villages, with lighting, everywhere. Fuck, I - [incomprehensible over the phone] - everything they are telling us on TV is bullshit, I am here myself right now, and I know what it's like, I'm telling you [phone chatter] In Kharkiv our own army is bombing the city, not the Ukrainians, our own army, they are walking through the streets [and bombing]. Just so you understand, we've been brought here and tossed out like fucking pigs -
item.dc:creator: SavingHongKong

item.title: Boyfriend Dump
item.dc:creator: DrJokerX

item.title: Autumn
item.description: Post FP & Accolade Award Edit: I worked with a friend 16 yrs who jumps this way. Wasn't just me. Anyone any approach if he's focused. He doesn't know why he does it. He used to be bummed out about it but now just apologizes to others because he knows they dread approaching him. Now, I have no idea if this young lady has the same issue. It looks like the guy actively scares her sometimes. Other times it's obvious she just reacts instinctively this way (parking lot). All I can say is I thought of my close friend when I saw this video. He would think it's hilarious. So I posted it. Please chill out in his honor. Or at least reconsider whether there's real trauma behind why she reacts this way. Finally Thank You! For the Accolade Award. I hope this made a lot more people smile than frown. I joined Imgur to help people get thru their days, not to add more burden. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Post Post Edit: Well the post is over 2000 pts and that's cool because some people got some kind of positive experience. YAY! There are often posts where I learn from all the wonderful interactions and (unfortunately) learn from not-so-pleasant ones too. I'm going to divide potential causes for the sensitivity or easily-startled tendency of some people. I have no idea which the young lady suffers from. One of the best lists (although not best for treatments) is here: https://lisbdnet.com/people-who-startle-easily/ 1) Trauma - There's many anecdotal references from people in the post to being easily startled after some traumatic stress. I won't list everything I learned but the most reading I did falls under "hypervigilance PTSD" of some kind. Often (not always) PTSD can be cured or treated through it's phases and many potential symptoms running its course. I sure hope folks suffering from this can get help. 2) Non-Trauma - There are so many genetic-caused or disease-based sensitivities it's easy to get lost. There are many paths for treatment(s) but not so-many cures as in PTSD. Some of the ones mentioned in the post and on the sites I visited are: + Hyperekplexia + Hypersensitivity (esp as part of ADD/ADHD) + Anxiety Disorders (many) + Schizophrenia + Exaggerated startle reflex in HPX (probably caused by brainstem pathology) + Hyperthyroidism + Mineral or vitamin deficiency (mostly curable, if no organ damage) Rather than sending a link to any sites for treatment, I think it's best to just say see your a medical and/or mental health professional to get actual diagnoses. I do not suggest this site or non-medical professionals. As a previously diagnosed sufferer of clinical depression, I suggest professional help before self help. Thanks for most of the conversation and all the positive stuff guys. Cheers !!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Desperately wanting to know wtf the BOFA joke is. May the Memery unloading commence.
item.description:
It's true. I live in Texas, and have finally shooed the snow away... For now...
No ma'am- you better go drop them babies back off at public school right now
He's beauty, he's grace
Pretty sure this means that masks are actually just facial hymens. Right on.
This ad for herpes
*getting them all well acquainted with that r/antiwork mentality*
WHAT'S THE BOFA JOKE? Can I plz know?
This rude ass creep in Pogo
& this spinner was legit right down the street from Poltergeist Clock
Could not get this pic any more clear, so hopefully y'all can zoom in well enough :)
Oh, this is just my beloved baby angel girl: Halo

item.title: Day 278: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Supreme Pizza Burger 8oz Beef Patty Topped With Grilled Pepperoni, Fresh Melted Mozzarella, Grilled Onions, Bell Peppers, Mushrooms And Mom's Marinara On A Sourdough Bun From Our Mom's Restaurant & Bar In Hammond And Baton Rouge, LA Previous Day 277: https://imgur.com/gallery/45k3waR MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD

item.title: Most important sound you'll hear today
item.description: So yeah. Sound ON also, Trying to earn some small money for food, kinda desperate for anything I am looking for survey sites, only legit things I can think of is Mechanical Turk and Fiverr, please let me know if you have any other suggestions I would prefer if it pays in pay pal I dont mind if it pays very little, just need anything right now Waiting for a job to start and times been tough Also sending love and strength to the people of Ukraine, I wish I could help Screw putin

item.title: Almost lost my drone for this photo
item.description: I only had one battery left at 50% capacity and really wanted this image. This was a 3km return flight with head winds on the way back. At 5% the drone started landing on the other side of the lake (not too far from where I launched). Super lucky I got this shot, especially with the drone unharmed! Location: Lake Mackintosh, Tasmania Drone: DJI Air 2s Source: https://www.instagram.com/mmarrky/
item.dc:creator: notyourgenericmayonnaise

item.title: I need to watch his shows.
item.description: In 2015, President Zelensky starred in a comedy TV show as President of Ukraine. In one scene, German Chancellor Merkel calls Zelensky about membership in the European Union, but it turns out to be a mistake. Yesterday, Zelensky started the formal process for Ukraine to actually enter the EU. For those who wish to watch it this Sunday: https://www.standard.co.uk/culture/tvfilm/servant-of-the-people-channel-4-zelensky-how-to-watch-uk-b985624.html
item.dc:creator: Tonightat11DOOOOM
